spk_a.transcript: When I asked my colleagues, your bosses, who are the smartest minds in education, out of hundreds, we arrived at you, the six of you in this room.

spk_b.transcript: I have no idea how they got this. I specifically told my staff to destroy everything. I can't imagine...
